recommendations: Schedule a body-shop assessment within 7 days.

Treat rust spots promptly to stop corrosion spread; sand and prime before repainting.
Have glass damage assessed by an auto-glass specialist — small chips can often be filled.
Structural cracks should be inspected by a certified technician before further driving.
Vehicle is NOT recommended for driving until structural repairs are completed.
Estimated repair exceeds $2,500 — consider filing an insurance claim.
